## Objective and acceptance criteria

-
- [ ]

## Data and modelling review

- [ ] Input schema, units, label meaning, and row identity are documented.
- [ ] Train/test or reference/evaluation separation is preserved where relevant.
- [ ] Preprocessing and model fitting use only allowed data.
- [ ] Grouped-baseline fallback behavior remains explicit.
- [ ] Invalid rows, files, anomalies, or groups are not silently discarded.
- [ ] Synthetic results are not presented as real-factory performance.

## Verification

List exact commands and outcomes:

```text

```

- [ ] Deterministic behavior was checked where a seed applies.
- [ ] Valid, invalid, empty, grouped, and artifact cases were tested where relevant.
- [ ] Metric counts and label alignment were reviewed.
- [ ] Docker behavior was checked if container files or runtime changed.

## Compatibility

- [ ] CLI, input schema, output files, detector names, parameters, and metric definitions remain compatible or changes are documented.
